title: merge=union for JSONL gitattributes
rationale: Built-in git merge strategy that keeps all unique lines from both sides. Perfect for append-only JSONL — no custom merge driver needed unlike Beads which requires merge=beads

title: Provider-optimized prime formats
rationale: XML for Claude (40% accuracy variance on delimiter choice per research), plain text for Codex, markdown default. --format flag on mulch prime selects output.
